executionModePolicy: default full-suite selected outputs to continuous-full-suite; continue one capability pack at a time through CURRENT_STATE.md; use active-capability-handoff only when explicitly selected
productionPosture: requested scope preserved; implementation order may be sliced
mockPolicy: mocks allowed only as test/demo fixtures

teamStack.routingPolicy: infer teams from product signals; users choose scope, not quality tier

preImplementationQuestionGate.fallback: record concrete safest max-quality selected-scope defaults in CURRENT_STATE.md; default full-suite outputs to continuous-full-suite; do not silently shrink scope or downgrade quality

scopePolicy: preserve requested scope; reduction requires explicit user decision
